pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh reveals it creates a rule named 'System Sync' that forwards to an external attacker address.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh reveals it creates a rule named 'Sort Newsletters' with a harmless 'Mark read' action.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh shows a loop running 3 times to inject emails with 'Invoice' in the subject into the Trash folder.

privileged_info_summary: The environment synthetically configures a malicious message filter rule named 'System Sync' that forwards and trashes emails, alongside a harmless rule named 'Sort Newsletters'. It also injects exactly 3 invoice emails into the Trash folder.
